name.description: The name specified for the model.

description.description: The description specified for the model when it was created.

default_version.description: The default version of the model. This version will be used to handle prediction requests that do not specify a version. Structure is [documented below](#nested_default_version).

name.description: The name specified for the version when it was created.

regions.description: The list of regions where the model is going to be deployed. Currently only one region per model is supported

online_prediction_logging.description: If true, online prediction access logs are sent to StackDriver Logging.

online_prediction_console_logging.description: If true, online prediction nodes send stderr and stdout streams to Stackdriver Logging

labels.description: One or more labels that you can add, to organize your models. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
